summary: Tested ElevenLabs TTS integration for Mira's voice. Backend /api/tts/generate endpoint works correctly (12/12 tests passed). Fixed frontend bug where API_URL was undefined in MiraChatWidget.jsx. Added ElevenLabs TTS to MiraAI.jsx (homepage component) which was missing the integration. Both components now try ElevenLabs first, falling back to Web Speech API.
critical_code_review_comments: MiraChatWidget.jsx had undefined API_URL - fixed to use getApiUrl()
MiraAI.jsx (homepage) was missing ElevenLabs TTS integration - added speakWithElevenLabs function
updated_files: /app/frontend/src/components/MiraChatWidget.jsx - Fixed API_URL to getApiUrl(), added debug logs (cleaned up)
/app/frontend/src/components/MiraAI.jsx - Added ElevenLabs TTS integration (useElevenLabs state, audioRef, speakWithElevenLabs function)
context_for_next_testing_agent: ElevenLabs TTS integration is complete. Both MiraAI.jsx (homepage) and MiraChatWidget.jsx (pillar pages) now use ElevenLabs TTS with Web Speech API fallback. The /api/tts/generate endpoint returns base64 audio, handles emoji conversion, and fixes 'Mira' pronunciation to 'Meera'. Voice toggle button in chat header controls TTS. Console logs show '[Mira Voice] Attempting ElevenLabs TTS...' and '[Mira Voice] ✓ ElevenLabs audio received, playing...' when working.

backend_tts_voices.details: GET /api/tts/voices returns list of 21 available voices

emoji_handling.details: Emojis like 🐾 are converted to words like 'paw print'

frontend_miraai_elevenlabs.details: MiraAI.jsx (homepage) now uses ElevenLabs TTS with fallback

frontend_mirachatwidget_elevenlabs.details: MiraChatWidget.jsx (pillar pages) uses ElevenLabs TTS with fallback

voice_toggle.details: Voice toggle button in chat header controls TTS on/off
